indicators.name: marble dining table
indicators.rationale: Marble dining table is too hard and cold for comfort during sleep.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: White chairs are not suitable for sleeping due to their lack of cushioning and support.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is too cold and hard for comfort during sleep.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: Open layout with no walls or dividers makes it difficult to achieve a sense of enclosure and privacy.

indicators.name: no visible bed
indicators.rationale: No bed visible in the image, making it impossible to support the primary sleep activity.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is not well-suited for primary sleep. There is no bed visible, and the hard surfaces and open layout make it difficult to achieve a sense of enclosure and privacy. The marble dining table and white chairs are not suitable for sleeping due to their lack of cushioning and support.
